since_last: 61% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.59%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -0.63% · Gold -0.77% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 61% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.59%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.59%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.79%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.57%, LRCX +8.57%, ASML +8.28%, AMAT +7.37%, KLAC +7.05%. Laggards: IBM -24.79%, ISRG -6.06%, ADBE -4.72%, SAP -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.16% at $137.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: IBM moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: IBM is -24.75% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
